sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32480" key="e)kmoxlei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκμοχλ-εία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32480.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dislodgement,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φλέγματος</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.21</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
